name: QA 991
description:
PCP QA Test No. 991

Exercise the pcp-free(1) command using an archive



Copyright (c) 2014-2015 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu1804-i386-container reproduce
